steps.t: Addy Rushtuft can be found at Trader's Wharf. You should talk to Addy Rushtuft.
Cut stones and mining supplies can be found at the West-delf and East-delf in the Wildwood. You should destroy the cut stones and mining supplies foun…
Addy Rushtuft wishes to meet up near the West-delf in the Wildwood to mine the hills. You should talk to Addy Rushtuft in the Wildwood.
The entrance to Writhenset can be found in the West-delf and East-delf. You should enter Writhenset, defeat the mining leaders, and repair support bea…
The cave-in seems to have come near the West-delf entrance in Writhenset. You should find the source of the cave-in.
The cave-in seems to have come near the West-delf entrance in Writhenset. You should find the source of the cave-in.
Rubble can be found in Writhenset. You should clear the rubble to see what was in this section of the mine.
Rubble can be found in Writhenset. You should clear the rubble to see what was in this section of the mine.
Enid Nettlesting can be found at Trader's Wharf. You should talk to Enid Nettlesting.
